title: Glowing Potion
description: A potion that makes the entity glow
body:
# 📝About

This is a simple mod that adds a potion that gives the player that drinks it or the entity it is splashed on, the glowing effect from the base game.

## 🛠️Recipe

### Glowing Potion Brewing Recipe:

![Glowing Potion Brewing Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e76f17184c50830386a3937c819a485c1769a42d.png)

### Long Glowing Potion Brewing Recipe:

![Long Glowing Potion Brewing Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f83cfb66e9d6b824405b876c4bffe9842bb7260c.png)

## 🌟Other
In the future i will make a mod with potions for every effect for example withering, haste, dolphins grace. Send any other requests to my [Discord](https://discord.gg/MGHbPKwZwd).
